# The Makhana

> The Makhana is a premium Indian D2C snack brand selling roasted and raw makhana (foxnuts / phool makhana / lotus seeds). The brand is based in Delhi and sources its makhana from Bihar. Every batch is roasted in cold-pressed / olive oil and is never deep-fried.

## Key facts
- Product: roasted & raw makhana (foxnuts), in 6 roasted flavours, 1 raw pack and a variety combo.
- Nutrition: high in plant protein (~9g per 100g), naturally gluten-free, non-GMO, low in fat.
- Made without: palm oil, maida (refined flour), MSG, deep-frying or artificial colours.
- Pricing: from Rs.169 per pack. Free shipping on orders over Rs.599. Cash on Delivery available across India.
- Brand: based in Delhi, India; makhana sourced from Bihar (the makhana-growing region).
- Contact: hello@themakhana.in - Instagram @themakhanaofficial.

## Shop
- [Shop all foxnuts](https://www.themakhana.in/shop): the full range of roasted and raw makhana plus the combo.
- [Peri Peri Punch](https://www.themakhana.in/products/peri): bestselling spicy roasted makhana.
- [Chatpata Pudina](https://www.themakhana.in/products/pudina): tangy mint-chaat roasted makhana.
- [Cream & Onion](https://www.themakhana.in/products/cream): creamy, savoury roasted makhana.
- [Salt & Pepper](https://www.themakhana.in/products/salt): classic salt & cracked pepper makhana.
- [Himalayan Pink Salt](https://www.themakhana.in/products/pink): lightly salted, clean roasted makhana.
- [Classic Lightly Salted](https://www.themakhana.in/products/classic): pure everyday roasted makhana.
- [Raw Phool Makhana](https://www.themakhana.in/products/raw): premium handpicked raw foxnuts.
- [Variety Combo](https://www.themakhana.in/products/combo): five signature flavours, best value.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.themakhana.in/): brand overview and bestsellers.
- [Our Story](https://www.themakhana.in/about): how The Makhana sources from Bihar and packs in Delhi.
- [Blog](https://www.themakhana.in/blog): guides on makhana benefits, nutrition, recipes and more.
- [Contact](https://www.themakhana.in/contact): customer support, gifting and bulk enquiries.
